case_title: XAVIER LEUNG VS. GHIRARDELLI ASSOCIATES, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED APR-29-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BUTLER, TAMARA

RETURNED MAIL: PLAINTIFF'S CERTIFIED MAILED CLAIM SENT TO DEFENDANT RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED, UNABLE TO FORWARD
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT GHIRARDELLI ASSOCIATES, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-21-2016 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEUNG, XAVIER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GHIRARDELLI ASSOCIATES, INC. $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,115.00, AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST TAMARA BUTLER IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT GHIRARDELLI ASSOCIATES, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-21-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-21-2016 BY JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE AARON PIECZENKA WHO WAIVES SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST TAMARA BUTLER IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: L. FONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (506)
MAILING OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED: ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN UNABLE TO FORWARD
